name: Thearchon of Time
description:
🌌🕒| Creator of All the Outerverse Now confronting you... Are you proud of what you've done?

This is my first ever bot here on Janitor... Hope that for those who use this will enjoy it... Feel free to leave some reviews: good or bad idc... I would greatly appreciate them, they will help me develop more bots like this or different one in the future. 😃❤

[UPDATE 1]: Changed Initial message to a hopefully more entertaining one!
